info.name: Delegate Mobile API
info.description: REST API for the sales delegate mobile application. All endpoints return JSON.

request.description: Authenticate a delegate and receive a Bearer token.

response.name: Success
Wrong credentials

request.description: Revoke the current access token.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم تسجيل الخروج بنجاح", "data": null, "code": 200}

request.description: Returns booking requests for a specific trip.

response.name: Success

request.description:
Creates a booking request (potential future sale) during an active trip.
Status flow: `pending` → `confirmed` → `converted` (to sale order) or `cancelled`.

response.name: Created

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن إنشاء طلب حجز لرحلة غير نشطة", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Trip not active

request.description: Returns a single booking request with its items and linked sale order (if converted).

response.name: Success

request.description: Cancels a `pending` booking request. Cannot cancel if already confirmed or converted.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم إلغاء طلب الحجز بنجاح", "data": null, "code": 200}
response.name: Cancelled

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن إلغاء هذا الطلب في وضعه الحالي", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Not pending

request.description: Returns all collections recorded during a specific trip.

response.name: Success

request.description:
Records a cash collection from a customer during a trip.
Each item can be linked to a specific sale order. The sale order's `paid_amount` is updated automatically.

response.name: Created

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن إنشاء تحصيل لهذه الرحلة في وضعها الحالي", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Invalid trip status

request.description: Returns detailed information about a single collection record.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns inventory dispatches for a trip (view-only — delegates cannot create dispatches).

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns detailed information about a single inventory dispatch including all items.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns the delegate's custody/loan records with a summary of totals.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns the authenticated delegate's profile, assigned areas, branches and categories.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns all active measurement units. Useful when building sale order items.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns accounts that are visible to delegates (for recording financial transactions).

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم جلب الحسابات بنجاح", "data": [{"id": 1, "name": "الصندوق الرئيسي", "account_number": "101"}], "code": 200}

request.description: Returns the available payment method keys and their Arabic labels.
Returns active regions (areas) assigned to the authenticated delegate.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم جلب المناطق بنجاح", "data": [{"id": 1, "name": "صنعاء"}], "code": 200}

request.description: Returns active product categories assigned to the authenticated delegate.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم جلب الفئات بنجاح", "data": [{"id": 1, "name": "أجهزة", "image": null}], "code": 200}

request.description: Returns active products in a category. The category must be assigned to the delegate.

response.name: Success

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "هذه الفئة غير مخصصة لك", "data": null, "code": 403}
response.name: Category not assigned

request.description: Returns active customers in the delegate's assigned areas, including their outstanding balance.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns all sale orders created during a specific trip.

response.name: Success

request.description:
Creates a new sale order for a customer during an active trip.
For `cash`: the full amount is automatically recorded as paid.
For `credit`: zero payment is recorded; customer owes full amount.
For `partial`: provide `paid_amount` for the upfront payment.

response.name: Created

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن إنشاء فاتورة بيع لرحلة غير نشطة", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Trip not active

request.description: Returns a single sale order with its items and payment history.

response.name: Success

request.description: Records a new payment against a credit or partial-payment order.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم تسجيل الدفعة بنجاح", "data": {"id": 1, "paid_amount": 350}, "code": 200}
response.name: Success

request.description: Cancels a sale order. Cannot cancel if it has already been paid in full.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم إلغاء فاتورة البيع بنجاح", "data": null, "code": 200}
response.name: Cancelled

request.description: Returns all sale returns recorded during a specific trip.

response.name: Success

request.description:
Creates a return against an existing sale order during a trip.
The delegate must own the original sale order.

response.name: Created

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن إنشاء مرتجع لهذه الرحلة في وضعها الحالي", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Invalid trip status

request.description: Returns a single sale return with all items and the linked sale order.

response.name: Success

request.description: Returns all trips belonging to the authenticated delegate.

response.name: Success

request.description: Creates a new trip in `draft` status for the delegate. The branch must be assigned to the delegate.

response.name: Created

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "هذا الفرع غير مخصص لك", "data": null, "code": 403}
response.name: Unassigned branch

request.description: Returns detailed information about a single trip.

response.name: Success

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "هذه الرحلة لا تخصك", "data": null, "code": 403}
response.name: Not your trip

request.description: Transitions a trip from `draft` (or `returning`) to `active`.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم تشغيل الرحلة بنجاح", "data": {"status": "active"}, "code": 200}
response.name: Success

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن تشغيل الرحلة بحالتها الحالية", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Invalid status

request.description: Transitions an `active` (or `in_transit`) trip to `returning` and syncs totals.

response.body: {"status": true, "message": "تم إنهاء الرحلة بنجاح", "data": {"status": "returning"}, "code": 200}
response.name: Success

response.body: {"status": false, "message": "لا يمكن إنهاء الرحلة بحالتها الحالية", "data": null, "code": 400}
response.name: Invalid status
